title: MHT CET Answer Key 2026 - Overview

detail.title: MHT CET Answer Key 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: MHT CET Answer Key 2026 will be released on May 21 at cetcell.mahacet.org and mahacet.org. Know how to download the provisional key, check your response sheet, and raise objections online.

content.text: MHT CET Answer Key 2026 will be released online by the State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra, at cetcell.mahacet.org for PCM and PCB candidates who appeared in the entrance exam. The provisional MHT CET answer key, along with the response sheet and question paper PDF, will help students check the official correct answers, estimate their probable scores and decide whether they need to challenge any question within the given objection window.

rows: State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra
Provisional MHT CET Answer Key 2026 (PCM & PCB)
Application number and password / date of birth
Provisional answer key, response sheet, question paper
Per question, as notified by State CET Cell
Final answer key after resolving objections

sections.heading: How to download MHT CET Answer Key 2026 and response sheet

content.text: Candidates will have to log in with their MHT CET 2026 credentials to access the provisional answer key and response sheet.

items: Visit the official website cetcell.mahacet.org.
Click on the “MHT CET 2026 Answer Key / Response Sheet” link on the home page (or relevant notice link).
Log in using your application number and password/date of birth.
Open the answer key and response sheet link in your dashboard.
Download the PDFs and save them for future reference and score calculation.

content.text: Advise students to keep the downloaded files safely until the result and counselling are completed.

sections.heading: Details mentioned in MHT CET 2026 answer key and response sheet

content.text: The MHT CET Answer Key 2026 and response sheet will contain all the necessary information needed to cross-check answers.
You can highlight that it usually shows:

items: Candidate roll number/application number
Exam date, session and shift
Question ID for each question
Options (A, B, C, D) for each question
Correct option as per the provisional answer key
Option marked by the candidate in the exam
Marks allotted as per the marking scheme

content.text: A short explanation here helps students understand how to read the document correctly.

sections.heading: MHT CET Answer Key 2026 - Important instructions for candidates

content.text: To add real value, include short, practical advice:

items: Rely only on the official websites cetcell.mahacet.org and mahacet.org for the MHT CET 2026 answer key.
Keep your application number, password and registered mobile/email handy to avoid login issues.
Download the answer key and response sheet on a secure device and take a printout if needed.
File objections only with strong academic proof, within the official deadline.
Regularly check the State CET Cell website for updated notices on the result and counselling.
